signals.headline: Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.7% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's official annual inflation rate rose to 2.7% in March 2026 from 1.9% in February, confirming preliminary estimates and driven by a 7.2% surge in energy prices amid the Iran war; this is the highest since January 2024.[1][2][4]

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2.2%, Below Forecasts | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% prior, but undershot market expectations of 2.4%, signaling contained pressures despite global energy volatility.[3]  
This recent confirmation aligns with the central bank's 2% target and may ease concerns in prediction markets about aggres
